017package org.apache.juneau.rest;
018
019/**
020 * Static constants shared across Juneau REST modules (for example {@code juneau-rest-server},
021 * {@code juneau-rest-client}, and {@code juneau-rest-mock}) so wire names and other cross-tier
022 * strings stay aligned.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * Add more {@code public static final} fields here when server and client (or other REST modules)
026 * must agree on the same literal values. Server-only constants belong in
027 * {@code RestServerConstants} in {@code juneau-rest-server}.
028 */
029@SuppressWarnings({
030   "java:S115", // Names use HEADER_/QUERY_ + camelCase to mirror wire identifiers; not strict UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
031})
032public final class RestSharedConstants {
033
034   private RestSharedConstants() {}
035
036   /**
037    * Serializer session options request header (JSON5 object format).
038    *
039    * <p>
040    * HTTP header names are case-insensitive; use this spelling in OpenAPI and examples.
041    * Example value: <js>{escapeSolidus:true,maxIndent:4}</js>
042    */
043   public static final String HEADER_JuneauSerializerOptions = "X-Juneau-Serializer-Options";
044
045   /**
046    * Parser session options request header (JSON5 object format).
047    *
048    * <p>
049    * HTTP header names are case-insensitive; use this spelling in OpenAPI and examples.
050    * Example value: <js>{trimStrings:true}</js>
051    */
052   public static final String HEADER_JuneauParserOptions = "X-Juneau-Parser-Options";
053
054   /** Serializer session options query parameter (UON-encoded map format). Example: <js>(maxIndent=4,sortMaps=true)</js> */
055   public static final String QUERY_juneauSerializerOptions = "juneauSerializerOptions";
056
057   /** Parser session options query parameter (UON-encoded map format). Example: <js>(trimStrings=true)</js> */
058   public static final String QUERY_juneauParserOptions = "juneauParserOptions";
059}
